parameters.name: Count type
parameters.description: Type of counts to normalize. Must be a count type in names(moo@counts)

parameters.name: Normalization type
parameters.description: Normalization type (default: voom)

parameters.name: Group column name
parameters.description: Column from sample metadata containing sample group information (e.g. treatment, phenotype)

parameters.name: Input already log2
parameters.description: Set TRUE if counts are already log2-transformed

parameters.name: Voom normalization method
parameters.description: Normalization method for limma::voom

parameters.name: Feature ID column name
parameters.description: Column from the counts data containing Feature IDs
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to use the first column in the counts matrix by default

parameters.name: Sample ID column name
parameters.description: Column from the sample metadata containing sample names
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to use the first column in the sample metadata by default

parameters.name: Label column name
parameters.description: Column from sample metadata containing labels for plots
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to use the sample ID column

parameters.name: Samples to include
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of samples to include
parameters.help_text: Leave blank to include all samples

parameters.name: Samples to rename
parameters.description: Sample renaming pairs: old_name:new_name

parameters.name: Colors for plots
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of colors for PCA and histogram
parameters.help_text: Use color names or hex codes. Leave blank to use defaults

parameters.name: Add labels to PCA
parameters.description: Label points on the PCA plot

parameters.name: PCA component on x-axis
parameters.description: Principal component to plot on the x-axis

parameters.name: PCA component on y-axis
parameters.description: Principal component to plot on the y-axis

parameters.name: Legend position for PCA
parameters.description: Legend position for the PCA plot

parameters.name: Label offset x
parameters.description: Label offset x for the PCA plot

parameters.name: Label offset y
parameters.description: Label offset y for the PCA plot

parameters.name: Label font size
parameters.description: Label font size for the PCA plot

parameters.name: Point size for PCA
parameters.description: Point size for the PCA plot

parameters.name: Color histogram by group
parameters.description: Color histogram by group instead of sample

parameters.name: Set histogram x-axis min/max
parameters.description: Set min/max value for histogram x-axis

parameters.name: Histogram x-axis minimum
parameters.description: x-axis minimum for histogram plot

parameters.name: Histogram x-axis maximum
parameters.description: x-axis maximum for histogram plot

parameters.name: Legend font size for histogram
parameters.description: Legend font size for histogram plot

parameters.name: Legend position for histogram
parameters.description: Legend position for histogram plot

parameters.name: Histogram legend columns
parameters.description: Number of columns for the histogram legend

parameters.name: Plot correlation heatmap
parameters.description: Create a correlation matrix heatmap for sample similarity
parameters.help_text: Set to FALSE for datasets with many samples to avoid long run times

parameters.name: Interactive plots
parameters.description: Create interactive plots with plotly (PCA and histogram)
parameters.help_text: Interactive plots allow hovering to view sample information, but correlation heatmap will not display
